Created lua/neotex/util/process.lua with full process manager: job registry, start/stop/list lifecycle, port auto-detection via vim.uv.new_tcp(), browser auto-open with dedup, VimLeavePre cleanup, filetype launcher registry with slidev and typst defaults, and virtual process registration for plugin-managed processes.

artifacts.summary: Research on existing job management patterns, utility module conventions, port detection, browser opening, and VimLeavePre cleanup for process manager design
3-phase implementation plan: core registry and API, browser auto-open with notifications, filetype launcher registry with slidev and typst defaults
Implementation summary for process manager core module

active_projects.completion_summary: Created lua/neotex/plugins/tools/process-picker.lua with telescope picker for background processes: fixed-width column display (name, cmd, port, uptime, status), buffer previewer with stdout/stderr from ring buffers, CR to kill and refresh, C-o to open port in browser, pcall guards and nil-safe field access throughout.

artifacts.summary: Telescope picker API patterns, recommended module structure, entry format, previewer, and action mappings for process management
2-phase implementation plan for telescope process picker with entry maker, previewer, and kill/browser actions
Implementation summary for telescope process picker module

active_projects.completion_summary: Added 4 process management keymappings (xl/xp/xk/xo) to which-key.lua: launch dispatches via process.launch() with registered filetype launchers, process picker uses telescope picker.show(), kill all via process.stop_all(), open in browser finds current file's running process port. All mappings use pcall wrappers for graceful degradation.

artifacts.summary: Which-key structure analysis, recommended mappings (xl/xp/xk/xo), icon choices, filetype dispatch strategy, and integration points with process.lua and telescope picker
Single-phase plan to add 4 process management keymappings (xl/xp/xk/xo) to which-key.lua with filetype-aware launch dispatch

active_projects.completion_summary: Migrated after/ftplugin/typst.lua from ad-hoc vim.fn.jobstart/jobstop with script-local typst_watch_job variable to neotex.util.process registry API. typst_watch and typst_compile now use process.start(), typst_watch_stop uses process.find_by_name/stop. Added TypstPreview wrapper functions (start/stop/toggle) with virtual process registry entries via register_external/deregister. Updated which-key mappings for lp/lx/ll to use wrappers. Updated tinymist_clear_cache to deregister preview entry.

artifacts.summary: Complete inventory of typst job management code, migration strategy for typst_watch/typst_compile to process.lua, TypstPreview wrapping approach, risk assessment
